title: Steve Sky Overlay
description: A fabricskybox sky overlay of Minecraft's Steve.
body:
A fabricskybox sky overlay of the famous character Steve from Minecraft. A picture of Steve sitting next to a diamond ore block in a field with his diamond pickaxe resting on top of it. A soft sunset fills the sky.

**This sky requires the mod FabricSkyBoxes. Without it, you will be unable to see it.**

![Steve](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90990b11c87a7279579c51ae108feef74d7a756b_0.webp)
